title: AFI Analyst Strategy Config v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — the analyst's strategy selection object)
description: The canonical analyst strategy configuration (afi.analyst-strategy-config.v1): the SELECTION object that binds one canonical strategy identity triple (OBJ-GOV D-OBJ-3: analystId + strategyId + strategyVersion) to a pinned pipeline topology (pipelineRef with canonical manifestHash), a scorer plugin (scorerRef), a UWR scoring profile (uwrProfileRef), and a decay configuration (decayConfig), with bounded per-node overrides. It carries the CHOICES; the pipeline manifest carries the GRAPH. This is the object the resolution seam keys on to map an inbound signal to a strategy/pipeline.
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only — NO resolver, NO runtime, NO registry implementation. Referencing a uwrProfileRef does NOT wire the qualification gate, change production scoring law, or create reward eligibility (PR-UWR doctrine unchanged); an analyst config naming an identity the runtime does not recognize under UP-10 fail-closes at the UWR stamp, exactly as today. Cross-field/cross-artifact constraints JSON Schema draft-07 cannot express (strategyId embedded-major agreement, override boundedness, ref resolution) are governed contract constraints in x-afiConstraints, enforced by tooling/tests.
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 — authorizes the canonical V1 contract family

afi-governance/decisions/object-identity-v0.1.md (OBJ-GOV) D-OBJ-3 — canonical strategy identity triple: analystId + strategyId (bare snake_case slug with embedded major-version token; never embeds the analyst name) + strategyVersion (semver, NO v prefix)

afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md (PR-UWR) UP-10 — profile/identity RECOGNITION is a runtime property; selecting a profile here confers nothing (no qualification, no rewards, no production scoring law)
reports/afi-configurable-dag-live-runtime-reconciliation.md §5/§6.2 — the analyst configuration carries the SELECTION (identity + pipelineRef + bounded overrides), not the graph

x-afiConstraints.strategyIdMajorAgreement: CROSS-FIELD (not JSON-Schema-draft-07-enforceable): the major-version token embedded in strategyId (the trailing _v<major>) MUST equal the major component of strategyVersion (e.g. trend_pullback_v1 pairs only with 1.x.y). Enforced by tooling/tests.
x-afiConstraints.analystNameNotEmbedded: strategyId is a bare strategy slug and MUST NOT embed the analyst name (OBJ-GOV D-OBJ-3). Not pattern-enforceable; reviewed at registration.
x-afiConstraints.boundedOverrides: nodeOverrides may only reference node ids present in the referenced pipeline manifest, and only tune {enabled, config} — never topology, plugins, joins, or the scorer. An override's config is validated against the bound plugin's paramsSchema exactly like the base config. Cross-artifact; enforced by factory validation.
x-afiConstraints.pinnedTopology: pipelineRef.manifestHash pins the EXACT canonical pipeline manifest (schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md, domain tag afi.factory.pipeline-manifest). A resolved manifest whose canonical hash differs fails closed.
x-afiConstraints.scorerAgreement: scorerRef MUST identify the plugin bound by the referenced pipeline's single scorer node (same pluginId+pluginVersion). Cross-artifact; enforced by factory validation.
x-afiConstraints.hashMaterial: The canonical analystConfigHash (afi.composition-ref.v1 / registration, domain tag afi.factory.analyst-config) is computed over this object per schemas/hashing/canonical-json-hashing.v1.md, EXCLUDING metadata.

schema.description: Schema-id version of the analyst strategy config.

analystId.description: Canonical triple member (OBJ-GOV D-OBJ-3): the analyst identity, kept orthogonal to strategyId.

strategyId.description: Canonical triple member (OBJ-GOV D-OBJ-3): bare snake_case strategy slug with the embedded major-version token (e.g. trend_pullback_v1). The embedded major MUST match strategyVersion's major (x-afiConstraints.strategyIdMajorAgreement); the analyst name is never embedded.

strategyVersion.description: Canonical triple member (OBJ-GOV D-OBJ-3): semver, NO v prefix (e.g. 1.0.0).

pipelineRef.description: Pin of the exact pipeline topology this strategy runs: identity + canonical manifest hash (fail-closed on mismatch).

manifestHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 of the referenced afi.pipeline.v1 manifest (canonical-json-hashing.v1; description/metadata excluded).

scorerRef.description: The scorer plugin identity. MUST agree with the referenced pipeline's single scorer node (x-afiConstraints.scorerAgreement).

uwrProfileRef.description: The UWR scoring profile this strategy scores under (e.g. a registries/uwr-profiles entry). Selection here is configuration only: recognition, qualification, and rewards remain separately governed (UP-10/UP-9/§6).

decayConfig.description: Decay selection: EITHER a reference to a governed decay template (ref.templateId, e.g. a GreeksDecayTemplate id) OR an inline surface (halfLifeMinutes > 0 + the greeksTemplateId it derives from). Exactly one form.

templateId.description: Id of a governed decay template (e.g. decay-swing-v1).

greeksTemplateId.description: The Greeks template family the inline surface derives from.

nodeOverrides.description: OPTIONAL bounded per-node overrides, keyed by node id of the referenced pipeline (x-afiConstraints.boundedOverrides). Only {enabled, config} are tunable — never topology.

enabled.description: Disable/enable the node (only admissible on nodes whose absence keeps the graph admissible; factory-validated).

config.description: Replacement node config; validated against the bound plugin's paramsSchema.

metadata.description: OPTIONAL free-form annotations; non-authoritative; EXCLUDED from canonical hash material (analystConfigHash).
